column8: Is that my milkshake or yours milkshake?
column9: Look where the dog has put its bone!
column10: I haven't got a camera with me because I've lent mine to my brother.
column11: Your DVD player is just the same as theirs is.
column12: Was it your decision or hers decision?
column13: You can borrow my laptop, but why aren't you using yours laptop?
column14: I think those are your CDs and these are ours.
column15: This is her book, these are your books and these two are mine books.
column16: That video belongs to Carol and Doug - at least, I think it's theirs video.
